title: Chapter 178
content:
I know I owe you guys an extra chapter for the review, but I am currently working on the artwork, a new one. This artwork wouldn't be as realistic as before, but there is more potential, and an option to make small videos. It's not straining on my system as well, which is another good thing about it. The only drawback is that it strains my wallet, which is why I can't create a lot of it every day.

Well, looking at another angle, it is quick, and while the errors are a lot, it is still better than waiting six minutes for each picture, which may or may not turn out to be exactly as I imagined.

Also, another news that you guys wouldn't like is that it isn't free. It is free for now, so you guys can see what it is, but it will be private from tomorrow. Hopefully, you guys don't mind. Hope you will support me by applying to that tier.

Link at the end.

Now, enjoy.

~~
